title: HUMAN: Expand 2a.5 Desync Recovery State Machine FSM for CCP-11
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md has [STUB] for Desync Recovery State Machine (states UNJOINED/JOINED/DRIFT/RECOVER, transitions on RPL version change, epoch drift, multi-root conflict, timers, integration with select_channel fallback to CH0, wall_clock_valid, SFN reset). Follow previous CCP patterns (pseudocode first, vectors, interop tests). Tag human,ccp,da2q.11 --json
notes: HUMAN: What is the exact normative FSM/table for desync recovery states (UNJOINED/JOINED/DRIFT/RECOVER), transitions on RPL version change/epoch drift/multi-root conflict, timers, SFN reset, wall_clock_valid, select_channel fallback to CH0 for CCP-11 robustness? Provide before impl.
